title: Indulgent American Corn Fritters
description: A sweet and savory twist on traditional corn fritters, perfect for a indulgent snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, melted butter, heavy cream, honey, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat about 1/2-inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
